name: Gav's 1v1 Map
author: Made by Gav
cardDescription: Includes a proper 1v1 map and allows for practice on Fortnite v27.11
description:
Includes a proper 1v1 map and allows for practice on Fortnite v27.11

**Features:**
- Change the background by pressing Insert
- Arena Points included
- No Fall Damage
- Spawn loadout: Blue AR, Gold Pump, Skye Grappler, Mini Shields

---

Note: Works with our gameserver Magnesium when you select the "Gav 1v1 Map" playlist
